ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Math, Science) */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the subject (e.g., MATH101) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the assessment belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who created the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Summative, Formative) */,
  "initial_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assessment */,
  "final_date" TEXT /* End date of the assessment */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the assessment resource (e.g., YouTube video) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assessment */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who is enrolled */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student in the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark received for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_submissions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_records" (
  "audit_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the audit record belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the submission */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_records_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the analytics record belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the submission */,
  "average_mark" REAL /* Average mark achieved by the student in the assessment */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the student in the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assessment submission, grade update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
